EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} is executing the command "{object.process.cmdline}" inside the container {datafield7} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to execute the command "{object.process.cmdline}" inside the container {datafield7} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} executed the command "{object.process.cmdline}" inside the container {datafield7} on host {event_src.host}
